title: eriogonum ovalifolium subsp. vineum
intro: Eriogonum ovalifolium subsp. vineum, also known as vineleaf buckwheat or mountain buckwheat, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buckwheat family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eriogonum ovalifolium subsp. vineum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, among others. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
